page: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highcpu-30 is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. It features 30 dedicated vCPUs mapped from 15 physical cores with multithreading enabled at 2.0 threads per core. The instance is equipped with 59.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 1.97 GB of RAM per core. It does not include bundled local storage or GPU hardware accelerators, and provides zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

In performance evaluations, the instance demonstrates strong single-core CPU capabilities, with stress-ng single-core performance scoring in the top 25% at 2865.07. Multi-core performance is average, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 43031.83 and a Geekbench multi-core score of 14394.0. Memory performance is notable, with Passmark memory scores ranking in the top 25%, supported by a read-only small-block cached memory bandwidth of 2124.95 GB/sec and uncached large-block write bandwidth of 25.11 GB/sec. Text processing and small-model LLM text generation also perform in the top 25% tier, while database operations, static web serving, and software compilation fall within average ranges.

The c3d-highcpu-30 offers high compute density relative to its memory footprint, making it a cost-efficient choice for CPU-bound workloads that do not require massive memory allocations or local NVMe storage. However, the lack of local storage and GPU acceleration limits its utility for heavy data-science training or high-I/O database tasks. It is best suited for workloads such as text processing, web serving, software compilation, and lightweight machine learning inference.
description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highcpu-30 is an x86_64 compute-optimized server instance configured with 30 dedicated vCPUs and 59.0 GB of RAM, powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor. Lacking local storage and GPU accelerators, this instance focuses its resource density on raw CPU execution, offering 1.97 GB of memory per core. Benchmark results highlight strong single-core CPU performance and high-tier memory performance, alongside average multi-core and database execution speeds. It excels in text processing and small-model LLM text generation, making it a cost-efficient option for compute-heavy, memory-lean workloads. The instance is well-suited for software compilation, web serving, and lightweight inference tasks.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highcpu-30 is a compute-optimized instance featuring 30 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 59 GB of RAM, and strong single-core performance, designed for CPU-intensive workloads.

tagline: A compute-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and high-performance single-core execution for CPU-bound workloads.
